name: I got in a car accident delivering for DoorDash in Salt Lake City—what do I do first?
description: First, screenshot your active status in the app to prove you were on the clock. While gig companies often label you a contractor, you may still be eligible for

mainEntity.name: I got in a car accident delivering for DoorDash in Salt Lake City—what do I do first?

acceptedAnswer.text: First, screenshot your active status in the app to prove you were on the clock. While gig companies often label you a contractor, you may still be eligible for benefits or occupational insurance depending on the circumstances of the crash.
